headline: Is Datadog’s (DDOG) New Experiments Tool Deepening Its Moat In Observability And Analytics?
summary: Earlier this month, Datadog announced the global general availability of Datadog Experiments, an experimentation platform that unifies A/B testing with product analytics and observability data across its existing tools. By pairing experiment results with real-time application performance, user behavior, and warehouse-based business metrics, Datadog is positioning experimentation as a core workflow for product, engineering and design teams using its platform. Next, we'll examine how Datadog...

headline: Managed Agents are actually bullish for these software stocks: Morgan Stanley
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley analysts are pushing back on the software sector’s reaction to the rise of managed AI agents, arguing that the selloff in cloud infrastructure stocks misreads how the technology actually works.
